metadata.source_of_truth: This file is the canonical machine-readable inventory for CUDA-Q Academic lessons, track membership, and live visualization-gallery widgets.
metadata.lesson_policy: Use lessons for content discovery and track routing. For deeper notebook detail or when updating a lesson, consult the notebook intro cell when it exists.
metadata.widget_policy: Widget metadata is sourced from visualization-gallery.html on the widgets-as-html branch because the main branch does not contain the full live gallery inventory.

quick-start-to-quantum.title: Quick Start to Quantum Computing
quick-start-to-quantum.summary: Foundational track from single qubits to a first variational algorithm in CUDA-Q.

simulation-101.title: Quantum Algorithm Simulation 101
simulation-101.summary: Introduces the tradeoffs between state vector, tensor network, MPS, Pauli propagation, and stabilizer simulation in CUDA-Q.

qis-foundational-algorithms.title: QIS Foundational Algorithms
qis-foundational-algorithms.summary: Foundational quantum algorithms spanning teleportation, oracle problems, QFT, phase estimation, Grover, and Shor.

qec-101.title: QEC 101
qec-101.summary: Quantum error correction from repetition codes and stabilizers through qLDPC codes, detector error models, and real-time decoding.

chemistry-simulations.title: Chemistry Simulations
chemistry-simulations.summary: Quantum chemistry lessons covering VQE, ADAPT-VQE, QPE, Krylov methods, and QM/MM workflows.

applications-to-finance.title: Applications to Finance
applications-to-finance.summary: Finance-focused lessons on quantum walks, portfolio optimization, and Q-CHOP.

qaoa-for-max-cut.title: QAOA for Max Cut (Circuit Cutting)
qaoa-for-max-cut.summary: QAOA for Max Cut with divide-and-conquer and recursive circuit-cutting strategies.

ai-for-quantum.title: AI for Quantum
ai-for-quantum.summary: Uses AI models to tackle bottlenecks in unitary compilation, error correction, and eigensolver workflows.

dynamics-101.title: Dynamics 101
dynamics-101.summary: GPU-accelerated lessons on Jaynes-Cummings dynamics and time-dependent Hamiltonians.

hybrid-workflows.title: Hybrid Workflows
hybrid-workflows.summary: Cross-cutting hybrid classical-quantum workflows spanning LABS optimization, QAOA, quantum walks, and VQE/GQE.

quickstart-01-start-small-with-one-qubit.title: 01 Start Small with One Qubit
quickstart-01-start-small-with-one-qubit.summary: Introduces single-qubit states, Bloch-sphere intuition, and the Pauli and Hadamard gates in CUDA-Q.

quickstart-02-multiple-qubits-and-entang.title: 02 Multiple Qubits and Entanglement
prerequisites: Quick Start Lab 1 or equivalent single-qubit background
quickstart-02-multiple-qubits-and-entang.summary: Builds intuition for multi-qubit registers, CNOT, Bell states, and entanglement in CUDA-Q.

quickstart-03-write-your-first-parameter.title: 03 Write Your First Parameterized Kernel
quickstart-03-write-your-first-parameter.summary: Introduces parameterized CUDA-Q kernels, rotation gates, and observable evaluation.

quickstart-04-build-your-first-variation.title: 04 Build Your First Variational Algorithm
quickstart-04-build-your-first-variation.summary: Builds an end-to-end variational workflow for a simple Hamiltonian using CUDA-Q.

simulation-101-choosing-the-right-simula.title: Choosing the Right Simulator
prerequisites: basic quantum-computing knowledge (qubits, gates, circuits, bra-ket notation, measurement)
expectation values and Pauli operators are helpful
simulation-101-choosing-the-right-simula.summary: Compares state vector, tensor network, MPS, Pauli propagation, and stabilizer methods so learners can choose the right CUDA-Q simulator.

teleportation.title: Teleportation
teleportation.summary: Explains the Bell-pair teleportation protocol for transferring a quantum state with classical communication.

bernstein-vazirani.title: Bernstein-Vazirani
bernstein-vazirani.summary: Shows how an oracle-based algorithm can recover a hidden bit string in a single quantum query.

deutschs-algorithm.title: Deutsch's Algorithm
deutschs-algorithm.summary: Uses interference to distinguish constant and balanced Boolean functions with fewer queries than a classical strategy.

quantum-fourier-transform.title: Quantum Fourier Transform
quantum-fourier-transform.summary: Builds the QFT circuit and develops intuition for phase kickback and Fourier-basis transformations.

quantum-phase-estimation.title: QPE: Canonical, Iterative, and Bayesian
prerequisites: eigenvalues and eigenstates of Hermitian operators
quantum-phase-estimation.summary: Shows how canonical, iterative, and Bayesian QPE estimate eigenphases, with chemistry-motivated examples.

grovers-algorithm.title: Grover's Algorithm
grovers-algorithm.summary: Covers oracle design and amplitude amplification for quadratic-speedup search.

shors-algorithm.title: Shor's Algorithm
shors-algorithm.summary: Combines modular arithmetic, period finding, and the QFT to factor integers.

qec-01-introduction-to-qec.title: 01 Introduction to QEC
prerequisites: Quick Start to Quantum Computing or equivalent
qec-01-introduction-to-qec.summary: Introduces repetition codes, Hamming codes, and the core ideas that separate quantum error correction from classical error correction.

qec-02-stabilizers-shor-and-steane.title: 02 Stabilizers, Shor Code, Steane Code
qec-02-stabilizers-shor-and-steane.summary: Introduces the stabilizer formalism and works through Shor and Steane code implementations in CUDA-Q.

qec-03-noisy-simulation.title: 03 Noisy Simulation
qec-03-noisy-simulation.summary: Explores depolarizing and Pauli-style noise, noisy circuit simulation, and mitigation workflows in CUDA-Q.

qec-04-ai-decoders.title: 04 AI Decoders
qec-04-ai-decoders.summary: Introduces syndrome decoding through brute-force, neural, and BP+OSD decoders for Steane-code and qLDPC examples.
qec-04-ai-decoders.metadata_source: notebook intro cell + llms.txt (notebook contains merge-conflict markers later in the file)

qec-05-magic-state-distillation.title: 05 Magic State Distillation
qec-05-magic-state-distillation.summary: Explains why magic states are needed for universal fault-tolerant quantum computing and implements a distillation protocol in CUDA-Q.

qec-06-toric-and-surface-codes.title: 06 Toric and Surface Codes
qec-06-toric-and-surface-codes.summary: Covers toric and surface-code structure, logical operators on lattices, and minimum-weight matching decoding.

qec-07-qldpc-codes.title: 07 qLDPC Codes
qec-07-qldpc-codes.summary: Introduces quantum LDPC constructions and compares decoder performance on higher-rate code families.

qec-08-decoder-metrics-and-parallel-wind.title: 08 Decoder Metrics and Parallel Window Decoding
qec-08-decoder-metrics-and-parallel-wind.summary: Examines decoder benchmarking metrics and explores scalable temporal window-decoding strategies for large QEC systems.

qec-09-detector-error-models-and-real-ti.title: 09 Detector Error Models and Real-Time Decoding
qec-09-detector-error-models-and-real-ti.summary: Introduces detector error models and the API patterns needed for low-latency, real-time decoding workflows.

vqe-and-gqe.title: VQE and GQE
prerequisites: basic quantum chemistry terminology is helpful
vqe-and-gqe.summary: Introduces variational and generative quantum eigensolvers for molecular ground-state preparation.

adapt-vqe.title: ADAPT-VQE
adapt-vqe.summary: Demonstrates adaptive ansatz construction through operator-pool gradients and parallel CUDA-Q workflows.

krylov-subspace-diagonalization.title: Krylov Subspace Diagonalization
krylov-subspace-diagonalization.summary: Applies quantum Krylov-subspace diagonalization to approximate molecular eigenvalues with CUDA-Q.

qmmm-hybrid-simulation.title: QM/MM Hybrid Simulation
qmmm-hybrid-simulation.summary: Combines VQE and classical polarizable embedding to build a hybrid QM/MM chemistry workflow.

quantum-walks-for-finance-part-1.title: 01 Quantum Walks for Finance, Part 1
quantum-walks-for-finance-part-1.summary: Introduces discrete-time quantum walks as a tool for financial and stochastic modeling.

quantum-walks-for-finance-part-2.title: 02 Quantum Walks for Finance, Part 2
quantum-walks-for-finance-part-2.summary: Extends the quantum-walk toolkit to multi-step dynamics and option-pricing-style applications.

portfolio-optimization-three-ways-q-chop.title: 03 Portfolio Optimization Three Ways (Q-CHOP)
portfolio-optimization-three-ways-q-chop.summary: Formulates portfolio optimization as QUBO and compares QAOA, adiabatic, and Q-CHOP-style solution strategies.

max-cut-with-qaoa.title: 01 Max Cut with QAOA
prerequisites: Python familiarity including basic NetworkX usage
Quick Start to Quantum Computing or equivalent variational-algorithm background
max-cut-with-qaoa.summary: Introduces QAOA on small Max-Cut instances and sets up the divide-and-conquer extension used later in the track.

divide-and-conquer-qaoa-one-level.title: 02 Divide-and-Conquer QAOA (One Level)
divide-and-conquer-qaoa-one-level.summary: Shows how a one-level divide-and-conquer strategy breaks larger Max-Cut problems into tractable QAOA subproblems.

recursive-divide-and-conquer-qaoa.title: 03 Recursive Divide-and-Conquer QAOA
recursive-divide-and-conquer-qaoa.summary: Extends divide-and-conquer QAOA recursively to larger graph instances and deeper cutting workflows.

weighted-max-cut-project.title: 04 Weighted Max Cut Project
weighted-max-cut-project.summary: Serves as a capstone-style weighted Max-Cut assessment using the QAOA techniques developed earlier in the track.

compiling-unitaries-with-diffusion-model.title: 01 Compiling Unitaries with Diffusion Models
prerequisites: Quick Start to Quantum Computing or equivalent
compiling-unitaries-with-diffusion-model.summary: Uses diffusion models to synthesize quantum circuits that implement target unitaries.

jaynes-cummings-hamiltonian.title: 01 Jaynes-Cummings Hamiltonian
jaynes-cummings-hamiltonian.summary: Introduces GPU-accelerated dynamics through the Jaynes-Cummings model and atom-cavity time evolution.

time-dependent-hamiltonians.title: 02 Time-Dependent Hamiltonians
prerequisites: Jaynes-Cummings Hamiltonian or equivalent dynamics background
time-dependent-hamiltonians.summary: Extends CUDA-Q Dynamics to driven systems with explicitly time-dependent Hamiltonian terms.

labs-optimization.title: 01 Quantum-Enhanced Optimization (LABS)
prerequisites: Quick Start to Quantum Computing or equivalent
labs-optimization.summary: Builds a quantum-enhanced workflow for the low-autocorrelation binary sequence optimization problem.

bloch-sphere-visualizer.title: Bloch Sphere Visualizer
bloch-sphere-visualizer.summary: Interactive 3D representation of a qubit. Visualize state vectors, phase changes, and the difference between bit-flips and phase-flips.

borns-rule-and-sampling.title: Born's Rule and Sampling
borns-rule-and-sampling.summary: Explore probability amplitudes on the Bloch Sphere. Demonstrates Born's Rule, sampling histograms, and measurement outcomes.

cudaq-hello-world.title: CUDA-Q Hello World
cudaq-hello-world.summary: Visual circuit builder that autogenerates CUDA-Q code. Explore 'Get State', 'Sample', and 'Run' modes.

quantum-gate-visualization.title: Quantum Gate Visualization
quantum-gate-visualization.summary: A sandbox for single-qubit quantum gates. Visualize quantum gates on the Bloch Sphere.

quantum-random-walk.title: Quantum Random Walk
quantum-random-walk.summary: Explore a quantum random walk driven by a Hadamard gate acting on a quantum coin.

classic-and-split-step-random-walk.title: Classic and Split Step Random Walk
classic-and-split-step-random-walk.summary: Classic random walk and a variation where steps are split into two decisions.

diffusion-model-visualization.title: Diffusion Model Visualization
diffusion-model-visualization.summary: Visualizes diffusion, showing how noise is added or removed from data—key in thermodynamics and GenAI.

unitary-circuit-synthesis.title: Unitary Circuit Synthesis
unitary-circuit-synthesis.summary: Visualize the link between Unitary matrices and quantum gates on the Bloch Sphere.

cnot-gate-visualizer.title: CNOT Gate Visualizer
cnot-gate-visualizer.summary: Interactive breakdown of the CNOT gate. Visualize how control and target qubits interact to create entanglement.

vqe-convergence.title: VQE Convergence
vqe-convergence.summary: Dynamically visualizes VQE, showing how an optimizer updates parameters to find the ground state.

qubo-portfolio-optimization.title: QUBO Portfolio Optimization
qubo-portfolio-optimization.summary: Visualizes the solution to a Quadratic Unconstrained Binary Optimization (QUBO) problem for portfolios.

q-chop-vs-adiabatic.title: Q-CHOP vs Adiabatic
q-chop-vs-adiabatic.summary: Animated comparison of standard adiabatic evolution vs Q-Chop, comparing convergence speed.

adapt-vqe-widget.title: ADAPT-VQE
adapt-vqe-widget.summary: Demonstrates an adaptive algorithm that constructs its own ansatz iteratively to minimize energy.

krylov-subspace-widget.title: Krylov Subspace
krylov-subspace-widget.summary: Visualizes Krylov subspace methods used to approximate eigenvalues of large sparse matrices.

active-space-selection.title: Active Space Selection
active-space-selection.summary: Visualizes choosing a subset of variables (orbitals) to simulate while freezing others.

hybrid-system-qmmm.title: Hybrid System (QM/MM)
hybrid-system-qmmm.summary: Visualizes a multi-scale simulation where a quantum region is embedded within a classical environment.

labs-optimization-search.title: LABS Optimization Search
labs-optimization-search.summary: Visualizes the energy landscape of the Low-Autocorrelation Binary Sequence (LABS) problem.

binary-fraction-explorer.title: Binary Fraction Explorer
binary-fraction-explorer.summary: Toggle bits to accumulate fractions and match a target value. Builds intuition for binary representations used in quantum phase estimation.

interactive-qft-visualizer.title: Interactive QFT Visualizer
interactive-qft-visualizer.summary: Explore the Quantum Fourier Transform by interacting with phase rotations on the unit circle and observing the resulting matrix construction.

steane-code-noise-model-explorer.title: Steane Code Noise Model Explorer
steane-code-noise-model-explorer.summary: Simulate and correct quantum errors using Code Capacity, Circuit Level, and Phenomenological noise models on the Steane [7,1,3] code.

hamming-7-4-3-visualizer.title: Hamming [7,4,3] Visualizer
hamming-7-4-3-visualizer.summary: Visualizes error correction using parity bits and matrix multiplication to detect and correct single-bit errors in the classical Hamming code.

trajectory-noise-demo.title: Trajectory Noise Demo
trajectory-noise-demo.summary: Visualize trajectory-based error models showing how noise affects qubit state evolution over time.

mwpm-decoding-challenge.title: MWPM Decoding Challenge
mwpm-decoding-challenge.summary: Pair syndrome defects on a toric code lattice to find the minimum-weight perfect matching. Explore code distance and pattern difficulty.

error-digitization-explorer.title: Error Digitization Explorer
error-digitization-explorer.summary: See how small coherent rotation errors accumulate over many gate applications. Ideal vs noisy angle per gate with adjustable n.

qaoa-max-cut-explorer.title: QAOA Max Cut Explorer
qaoa-max-cut-explorer.summary: See QAOA working on the simplest interesting graph: a triangle (3 nodes, 3 edges). Play the role of the classical optimizer — two sliders control the cost angle (α) and mixer angle (β) — and watch quantum interference steer the probability distribution toward the max cut.

qaoa-optimization-landscape.title: QAOA Optimization Landscape
qaoa-optimization-landscape.summary: Explore the 3-D cost landscape of a 1-layer QAOA circuit, see how tuning parameters helps the optimizer find the optimal Max Cut, and discover why optimization gets harder at scale — the barren plateau problem.

choosing-the-next-operator-adapt-qaoa.title: Choosing the Next Operator (Adapt-QAOA)
choosing-the-next-operator-adapt-qaoa.summary: One QAOA layer has already been applied to a triangle graph. Now choose which operator to add next. The gradient tells you — drag the θ slider to see how each candidate operator changes the cost and which one improves the circuit the most (the core idea behind Adapt-QAOA).

adapt-qaoa-vs-standard-qaoa.title: ADAPT-QAOA vs. Standard QAOA
adapt-qaoa-vs-standard-qaoa.summary: Run a full ADAPT-QAOA side-by-side with standard QAOA on a Max-Cut problem. Build the ansatz layer-by-layer from the mixer pool using gradient-based operator selection and compare convergence.

bits-vs-qubits-vertex-coloring.title: Bits vs Qubits: Vertex Coloring
bits-vs-qubits-vertex-coloring.summary: Compare how classical bits and quantum qubits encode 2-colorings of a 7-vertex graph — one assignment at a time vs. all 128 simultaneously. Toggle bits, measure qubits, and build intuition for superposition and QAOA.
